THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, MONICA WOHLFARTH, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 630 40TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $5,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, $5000 DAMAGES TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE 1/5/99. IF DEFTS FAIL TO COMPLY, PLTF. MAY AMEND JUDGMENT TO RECOVER $10,000.
